milestoneTitle: Phase M9.18a.2 — Glow gradient amendment. User amendment to the design language: every outset color halo must be blur-gradient (blur > 0), never a hard spread-only ring (0 0 0 Npx color, blur=0). Hard rings cut off sharply at element edges and at any parent overflow clip, which is visually rejected. Cascade: (1) CLAUDE.md design-language bullet restates 'soft glows' as 'always blur-gradient' with a reach guide + carve-outs; (2) design-review SKILL.md gets a new Rule 11 'Glow gradient integrity' so the gate enforces it on future diffs; (3) 7 CSS selectors converted: --glow-focus token (unused, redefined to set standard), .tool-modal-learn-body input/textarea focus, .panel-tile/.continue-row hover, .dash-tile-icon.dash-tile-delete armed, .learn-action-btn-danger armed, .learn-zone-drop-candidate outer, .learn-zone-drop-active outer. Insets (highlight borders) and sub-2px hairline outlines are carve-outs — not glows.
